content: Hi, I'm so excited to share my new podcast with you! It's all about true crime, and I've been working on it for months.
That sounds like a fascinating topic! What inspired you to start a true crime podcast, and what can listeners expect to hear?

I've always been interested in true crime stories and the psychology behind them. I've been listening to podcasts like My Favorite Murder and Crime Junkie for years, and I thought, why not create my own? I've been working on it in my free time, while also finishing up my part-time MBA at the University of Utah.
That's great to hear! It's wonderful that you're pursuing your passion and creating content around it. What's it like living in Salt Lake City, UT, and how do you like the city?

I love it! The mountains are beautiful, and the people are all so friendly. I've been really enjoying the outdoor activities, like hiking and tennis, and I've found some great restaurants and cafes to hang out in. Plus, I've been able to connect with some other podcasters and true crime enthusiasts in the area, which has been really helpful for getting feedback and support.
That sounds like a great experience. What kind of true crime cases will you be covering on your podcast, and how will you be approaching the topic?

I'll be covering a mix of famous and lesser-known cases, and I'll be approaching them from a psychological and sociological perspective. I'll also be interviewing experts and individuals connected to the cases to get their insights and perspectives.
That sounds like a really comprehensive approach. Have you thought about collaborating with other true crime podcasters or experts in the field?

Actually, I've been talking to a few other podcasters about potential collaborations, like doing a joint episode or series. I think it could be a great way to reach a wider audience and create some really interesting and unique content.

That's a great idea! Collaborations can be a wonderful way to build relationships and create something new and exciting. What's your goal for the podcast in the next 6 months, and how do you plan on growing your audience?

I'd love to reach 1,000 subscribers and start monetizing my podcast through ads and sponsorships. I've also been thinking about creating some merchandise, like t-shirts and mugs, with my podcast's logo on them.

Those are great goals! I think you have a lot of potential for growth and success with your podcast. Is there anything else you'd like to talk about or any other challenges you're facing with your podcast?
I think that's all for now. Thanks for listening and offering some advice. It's been really helpful to talk through my challenges and goals with you.
You're welcome! It was my pleasure to help. I hope you have a great time creating content and growing your audience. Good luck with your podcast!
Thanks again for the support. I'm excited to get started and see where this new project takes me.
You're welcome! I'm excited to see where your podcast takes you too. Don't hesitate to reach out if you need any more advice or support.
